title: calycobolus acutus
intro: Calycobolus acutus is a plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Calycobolus acutus include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy in various cultures. Herbal preparations of Calycobolus acutus can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
